sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97230" key="strobilo/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στροβῑλ-ός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n97230.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whirling</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λιγνύς</foreign> cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.25</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Besant.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ara</title_> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
